name: GulfLink Logistics Center - UAE
shortDescription: A high-throughput GCC logistics hub with bonded-warehouse capabilities and direct access to Jebel Ali Port.
description:
GulfLink offers bonded-warehouse services, duty-deferred storage, and rapid re-export across GCC markets. High-throughput sorting lines, climate-controlled zones, and 24/7 customs processing support fast-moving consumer goods and electronics. Direct access to Jebel Ali Port and major highways ensures efficient multi-modal connectivity across the Gulf region.

Working Hours (GST):
Mon-Fri: 08:00-22:00
Sat: 09:00-17:00
Sun: 10:00-16:00
